case_title: 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, VS. YITING LIU ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, YITING THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 45 LANSING STREET #2411, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $189.20. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE 3-DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YITING

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YITING DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YITING
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YITING
DECLARATION OF JOLENE LOUGHREY IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED AUG-30-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YITING
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YITING
DECLARATION OF LOST OR OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YITING
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YITING
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YITING
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $467.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $430.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, YITING
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT [UNLAWFUL DETAINER - CCP 585(D)] FILED BY PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 45 LANSING DEVELOPMENT, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, YITING THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $11,510.00 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $467.00 COSTS, $7,568.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, $430.00 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,515.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
